subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The detailed letter thou hadst addressed to Jináb-i-Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق نامه مفصل که بجناب آقا سید اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @visitation Tablets
